changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between subject and module_subject
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_subject_to_module ON subject; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_subject_to_module_subject();

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between study_subject and module_study_subject
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_study_subject_to_module ON study_subject; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_study_subject_to_module_study_subject();
